aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO readiness with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks depth in content and user engagement elements.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
Expand service pages with detailed descriptions, keywords, and FAQs to improve search visibility.
Implement a blog section to regularly publish content related to roofing, HVAC, and construction in Florida.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes localized service information for Florida but lacks specific location-based content and geo-specific keywords.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has some geo-targeted elements but needs to enhance its local SEO strategy by incorporating more location-specific keywords and content.
critical_issues: No dedicated location pages for cities or regions in Florida.
Lack of geo-specific keywords in meta tags and content.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website but lacks citations across major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile listing.
Ensure consistent NAP information across major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Monitor and manage online citations to correct any inconsistencies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and user-generated content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local roofing and construction services in Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding customer reviews and testimonials to improve search visibility and trust.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that establishes the business as an expert in Florida's construction and roofing industry, such as detailed guides, case studies, and industry news.
